CREATE TABLE test_table (condition_column BOOLEAN, true_result INT, false_result INT);
SELECT ifthenelse(condition_column, true_result, false_result) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE t1 (boolean_flag BOOLEAN, value1 INT, value2 INT);
SELECT ifthenelse(boolean_flag, value1 + 5, value2 - 5) FROM t1;
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, val INT);
SELECT id, ifthenelse(val < 20, 'Low', 'High') AS range FROM t2;
CREATE TABLE t3 (emp_id INT, is_full_time BOOLEAN, salary INT);
INSERT INTO t3 VALUES (1, TRUE, 50000), (2, FALSE, 30000);
SELECT emp_id, ifthenelse(is_full_time, salary, salary * 0.8) AS adjusted_salary FROM t3;
CREATE TABLE t4 (a INT, b INT);
SELECT ifthenelse(a + b > 5, 'Sum is greater', 'Sum is not greater') FROM t4;
SELECT ifthenelse(('a' = 'b'), (SELECT MAX(val) FROM t2), (SELECT MIN(val) FROM t2));
CREATE TABLE t5 (status BOOLEAN, data INT);
SELECT ifthenelse(status = TRUE, data * 2, data / 2) FROM t5;
